title: ConferenceRanking: Mathematical Modeling and Calibration of Conference Ranking Dynamics
description: This repository contains the code and data for modeling and calibrating the dynamics of conference rankings. The model is a system of ordinary differential equations (ODEs) accounting for logistic growth, cumulative advantage, and asymmetric competition. Calibration is performed on real citation data (CPP – citations per paper) from 2011 to 2020 using the LBFGS optimization method. The project is implemented in Julia with the DrWatson framework for reproducibility.
